text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I've finished suggesting a training schedule
to Admire Vega...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm fine. Just taking in the fresh air...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing to worry about. I've taken some
medicine, so it'll go away soon enough.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list: Don't push yourself if it hurts.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You're right... Apologies for not telling you
sooner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Admire Vega is struggling with a
migraine...
